---
title: "PK Fixture Reference Styles"
format:
  docx:
    toc: true
---

# Heading 1

This file is used only to generate `pk_fixture_reference.docx`, a small Word
style reference document for Quarto output.

## Heading 2

Normal body text for PK fixture reports.

### Heading 3

| Column | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| TIME_H | Time after dose in hours |
| AVAL | Concentration value |

- Bulleted item
- Another bulleted item

1. Numbered item
2. Another numbered item
